fake_news_samples.text: BREAKING: You won't believe this miracle cure. Secret government lab confirms it works overnight.
INCROYABLE: ce vaccin tue, ne ratez pas cette révélation choquante.

real_news_samples.text: Reuters reports that regional leaders met today to discuss food security and drought response.
France 24 rapporte un accord régional sur la sécurité alimentaire signé ce matin.
